title: training bot
description: Training bot is a PvP training plugin for Paper/Leaf servers that spawns a configurable Citizens NPC to act as an AFK sparring partner.
body:
## Customizable AFK Bot:
Spawn a player-model practice partner with real hitbox and damage handling
## Shield Training:
Disabled by axes, visual blocking states, and automatic state refresh after appearance changes
## Totem System:
Toggle infinite totems or set a limit for controlled practice sessions
## Armor Flexibility:
Preset armor (Diamond/Netherite/None) or advanced custom per-piece setup with configurable protection types
## Combat Enhancements:
Permanent slow falling, Thorns III toggle, and configurable aim modes (Instant/Aggressive/Balanced/Slow)
## Follow Player:
Enable bot movement toward you for dynamic training scenarios
## Appearance Customization:
Set custom bot name and skin with instant application and safety reapply to prevent gear loss
## In-Game GUI:
Intuitive /bot menu for all settings, toggles, and bot management
## Required dependency:
This plugin requires Citizens for real player-model NPC entities.

Citizens: [Latest Builds](https://ci.citizensnpcs.co/) / [Spigotmc](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/citizens.13811/)

## Small Note:
There Are Still Some Issues in this mod which occur sometimes and sometimes they dont but respawning the bot may resolve them 
This mod was originally built as a crystal pvp practice bot but i just decided to add more customization in it and now it can be used for some more gamemodes too

## Tested:
This plugin was tested on Leaf 1.21.11 a fork of paper
